cliToolRecords.name: rtk
cliToolRecords.desc: RTK 是本地命令输出压缩工具，用于大目录、大日志、大测试输出、大 git diff 或大范围 rg 时减少 token 消耗。关键规则、SKILL.md、配置和精确代码片段仍应读取原文，不做无脑压缩。
cliToolRecords.descEn: RTK is a local command-output compression CLI for large directory listings, logs, tests, git diffs, and broad searches. Do not use it for rules, SKILL.md, configs, or exact source snippets that require verbatim reading.
cliToolRecords.prompt: 当命令可能产生大量输出时优先用 RTK，例如 `rtk ls`、`rtk rg`、`rtk git diff`、`rtk npm test`。读取规则、SKILL.md、prompt、配置和精确代码片段时不要用 RTK 替代原文。
cliToolRecords.promptEn: Use RTK for commands likely to produce large output, such as `rtk ls`, `rtk rg`, `rtk git diff`, and `rtk npm test`. Do not use it for rules, SKILL.md, prompts, configs, or exact code snippets.
cliToolRecords.evidence: thread 019eea88-df56-73d1-ba89-6e113e0d2665; installed rtk 0.43.0 and configured Hermes/Codex selective rule

externalProviderRecords.name: agnes-ai
externalProviderRecords.desc: Agnes AI 是外部 OpenAI-compatible 全模态 API Provider，可作为低成本文本、图像、视频和多模态实验候选。当前应标为待 API key 本机实测，不默认替换 CDX/Hermes 主模型。
externalProviderRecords.descEn: Agnes AI is an external OpenAI-compatible multimodal API provider for low-cost text, image, video, and multimodal experiments. Treat it as pending local API-key validation and do not replace the primary CDX/Hermes model by default.
externalProviderRecords.prompt: 需要低成本外部模型或多模态实验时，可把 Agnes AI 配成 OpenAI-compatible provider。先确认 API key、限流、隐私和质量；不要默认覆盖现有主模型。
externalProviderRecords.promptEn: Use Agnes AI as an OpenAI-compatible provider for low-cost external model or multimodal experiments. Confirm API key, rate limits, privacy, and quality first; do not overwrite the current primary model by default.
externalProviderRecords.evidence: thread 019eea88-df56-73d1-ba89-6e113e0d2665; official docs checked for quickstart/token plan/Hermes/Codex guides

contentSourceRecords.name: agency-agents-zh
contentSourceRecords.desc: agency-agents 中文内容源与智能体能力包，包含跨工程、设计、营销、产品、安全、测试等部门的 AI 专家角色。它不是单个可执行 skill，使用时应先选择右侧具体 agent / alias，再按 README 或安装脚本接入目标宿主工具。
contentSourceRecords.descEn: Chinese agency-agents content source and agent package covering engineering, design, marketing, product, security, testing, and more. It is not a single executable skill; choose a concrete child agent or alias first, then follow the README or install script for the target host.
contentSourceRecords.evidence: thread 019eea88-df56-73d1-ba89-6e113e0d2665; local README says 266 agents and 18 supported tools

referenceRecords.name: easy-vibe
referenceRecords.desc: DatawhaleChina easy-vibe 教程/文档仓库；不部署，只作为知识参考源，可供 Codex 和 Hermes 在任务中引用。
referenceRecords.descEn: DatawhaleChina easy-vibe tutorial and documentation repository. Use it as a knowledge reference for Codex and Hermes, not as a deployable tool.
referenceRecords.evidence: thread:安装并使用能力路由; user-reported 2026-06-30 install/reference
